prs.title: Refactor password reset URL generation logic
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Small refactor across 3 files with only 32 custom lines, isolating password reset URL generation logic into cleaner helpers.

prs.title: UI Enhancements and Authentication System Overhaul
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Major overhaul spanning authentication flows, forgot/reset password, onboarding, email templates, schema changes, and UI across 28 files with 1725 custom lines — a broad architectural expansion of the auth system.

prs.title: Staging update to main
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Large merge of 59 commits across two contributors touching 57 files with 2619 custom lines, encompassing a queue dashboard, worker restart infrastructure, slide deck features, readiness improvements, and multiple sub-PRs worth of work.

prs.title: Fix deployment issues by cleaning up amplify.yml migration commands
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Trivial cleanup of Amplify migration commands in a single config file with zero net additions.

prs.title: Fix missing getLatestFieldValuesForCompany function
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Modest bug fix adding a missing data-access function across 3 files with 54 custom lines, including DAL and Prisma query logic.

prs.title: Ch/slide deck
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Significant new slide deck feature with 1107 custom lines across 32 files, introducing a full presentation layer with multiple slide layouts, AI strategy content, context management, and scaled rendering components.

stories.name: Authentication & User Account Security Improvements
stories.rationale: Overhauled the authentication system with UI enhancements and fixed password reset URL generation to improve user account security and login experience.

stories.name: Staging to Production Release
stories.rationale: Promoted accumulated staging changes to the main production branch as a scheduled release.

stories.name: Deployment Pipeline Reliability Fix
stories.rationale: Resolved deployment failures by cleaning up erroneous migration commands in the Amplify CI/CD configuration.

stories.name: Company Data Retrieval Bug Fix
stories.rationale: Restored missing business logic for fetching the latest field values per company, ensuring data accuracy across the platform.

stories.name: AI-Powered Slide Deck Generation
stories.rationale: Built an AI agent feature to automatically generate slide decks, expanding Skematic's business readiness output capabilities.
